front: What was the impact of Fmoc chemistry on peptide synthesis?
back: Fmoc (9-fluorenylmethyloxycarbonyl) SPPS (1970s, Carpino) uses base-labile Fmoc for Nα-protection and acid-labile side chain protection. Advantages over Boc: 1) Milder conditions (piperidine/TFA), 2) No HF needed, 3) Orthogonal protection, 4) Automated synthesis compatible. Now dominant SPPS method.
